tasks.subject: Task 1: Design tokens + typography plugin
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace starter globals.css with violet/slate tokens (light+dark) + register @tailwindcss/typography.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm build && CI=true pnpm test:unit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/globals.css", "package.json", "pnpm-lock.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm build && CI=true pnpm test:unit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["typography plugin registered", "light+dark token vars", "tokens via @theme inline", "build+30 unit pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: UI primitives (components/ui/)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Token-driven Button/Input/Textarea/Card/Badge forwarding all props.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/ui/Button.tsx", "components/ui/Input.tsx", "components/ui/Textarea.tsx", "components/ui/Card.tsx", "components/ui/Badge.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Button variants forward props", "Input/Textarea forward aria-label", "Card surface", "Badge tone + stateTone"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: App shell / branded top-nav
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Branded nav (Documents/Inbox badge/Settings) making tokens+inbox reachable.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm build; CI=true pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/AppNav.tsx", "app/app/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nav links Documents/Inbox/Settings", "inbox-link + current-user preserved", "redirect+unreadCount kept", "auth e2e passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Documents list + New-document form polish
tasks.description:
**Goal:** /app card grid + state badges + polished create form + empty state.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/app/page.tsx", "components/NewDocumentForm.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["card grid + state badges + links", "empty state", "form labels+button preserved", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Document view + sidebar + editor polish (markdown typography)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Themed prose typography + restyle review bar/composer/sidebar/editor preserving hooks.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm build; CI=true pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/review.spec.ts tests/e2e/versioning.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/DocumentView.tsx", "components/CommentSidebar.tsx", "components/DocumentEditor.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["prose typography light+dark", "review bar Buttons + exact doc-state text", "all comment/thread/editor selectors preserved", "review+versioning e2e pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Inbox + Settings/tokens polish
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Restyle inbox list + token-management page with primitives, preserving hooks.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/InboxList.tsx", "app/app/inbox/page.tsx", "components/TokenManager.tsx", "app/app/settings/tokens/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["inbox Card rows + notification/links/mark-read", "token UI label/Create token/new-token/revoke + snippet", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Auth pages + public landing page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Brand login/register + add a real public landing page at /.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm build; CI=true pnpm test:e2e -- tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/login/page.tsx", "app/register/page.tsx", "app/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["branded auth cards preserve labels/names/redirects", "public landing hero + CTAs, logged-in redirect", "build + auth e2e pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Navigation e2e + full-suite verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Nav reachability regression test + confirm whole suite + build green.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:e2e && CI=true pnpm test:unit && CI=true pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/e2e/navigation.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:e2e && CI=true pnpm test:unit && CI=true pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["nav reaches settings+inbox", "landing get-started visible", "full e2e+unit+build green"]}
```
